summary: The diff implements changes across backend (main.mo), frontend query hooks (useQueries.ts), HomePage.tsx, and MyScriptsPage.tsx that collectively address all four requirements. REQ-1 through REQ-4 are substantively addressed, with evidence of correct actor method wiring, UI components for loading/empty states, edit/delete dialogs, and backend public endpoints. All major acceptance criteria appear covered, though some details (like stable storage upgrade persistence in REQ-4) cannot be fully verified from the truncated diff alone.

hallucinated_features.description: Onboarding modal with 'Do This First' message and home screen installation instructions tracked via localStorage
hallucinated_features.reason: The frontend-file-summaries.txt references OnboardingModal.tsx and useOnboardingModal.ts implementing a first-time visitor onboarding flow with PWA home screen installation instructions. This feature was not requested in any of the four requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: PWA manifest and meta tags for home screen installation
hallucinated_features.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt references a PWA manifest (public/manifest.json) and updated index.html with PWA meta tags for mobile home screen installation. This was not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Custom Rawly41 logo image with circular and ring styling in the Layout header
hallucinated_features.reason: frontend-file-summaries.txt describes Layout.tsx with a custom Rawly41 logo image with circular styling. Changing visual branding assets was not part of any stated requirement and is explicitly a non-goal (no redesigning of UI layout or visual theme).
